name: [GRIDHAND] Review Reputation Agent - Negative review alert → notify owner → track resolution

gridhand.scenario: Negative review alert → notify owner → track resolution
gridhand.description: When a customer leaves a negative review on Yelp or Google Reviews after business hours, the GRIDHAND system triggers a workflow that immediately notifies the owner via SMS and email, allowing them to address the issue promptly the next morning. The system then tracks the owner's response and resolution efforts, sending reminders and updates to ensure the issue is fully resolved within 24 hours, and finally, it requests the customer to revise their review if the issue was satisfactorily resolved, ultimately helping to protect the business's online reputation and improve customer satisfaction. By streamlining this process, the business owner can minimize the negative impact of bad reviews and maintain a strong online presence.
